Name: UTextRenderComponent
Description: Renders text in the world with given font. Contains usual font related attributes such as Scale, Alignment, Color etc.

Variables.Name: Text
Variables.Description:
Text content, can be multi line using
as line separator

Variables.Name: TextRenderColor
Variables.Description: Color of the text, can be accessed as vertex color

Variables.Name: WorldSize
Variables.Description: Vertical size of the fonts largest character in world units. Transform, XScale and YScale will affect final size.

Variables.Name: InvDefaultSize
Variables.Description: The inverse of the Font's character height.

Variables.Name: HorizSpacingAdjust
Variables.Description: Horizontal adjustment per character, default is 0.0

Variables.Name: VertSpacingAdjust
Variables.Description: Vertical adjustment per character, default is 0.0

Variables.Name: bAlwaysRenderAsText
Variables.Description: Allows text to draw unmodified when using debug visualization modes.

Functions.Name: SetText
Functions.Description:
Change the text value and signal the primitives to be rebuilt 
	  The FString variant is deprecated in favor of the FText variant

Functions.Name: K2_SetText
Functions.Description: Change the text value and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetTextMaterial
Functions.Description: Change the text material and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetFont
Functions.Description: Change the font and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetHorizontalAlignment
Functions.Description: Change the horizontal alignment and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetVerticalAlignment
Functions.Description: Change the vertical alignment and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetTextRenderColor
Functions.Description: Change the text render color and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetXScale
Functions.Description: Change the text X scale and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetYScale
Functions.Description: Change the text Y scale and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetHorizSpacingAdjust
Functions.Description: Change the text horizontal spacing adjustment and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetVertSpacingAdjust
Functions.Description: Change the text vertical spacing adjustment and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: SetWorldSize
Functions.Description: Change the world size of the text and signal the primitives to be rebuilt

Functions.Name: GetTextWorldSize
Functions.Description: Get world space size of text
